patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Inter, Roboto Mono.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, title, actions, onClose, icon, children.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: src, name, size, shape, status.
<Avatar> shape must be one of 'circle' | 'square'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, solid, size, pill, dot, icon, children.
<Badge> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<BreadcrumbItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, href, icon.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, fullWidth, loading, iconLeading, iconTrailing, as, children.
<Button> as must be one of 'button' | 'a'.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: elevation, padding, interactive, as, children.
<Card> padding must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description, indeterminate, error.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, title, description, size, align, footer, closeOnBackdrop, showClose, className, children.
<Dialog> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<Dialog> align must be one of 'center' | 'top'.
<Dropdown> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: trigger, items, align, side, className.
<Dropdown> align must be one of 'start' | 'end'.
<Dropdown> side must be one of 'top' | 'bottom'.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, label, children.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, size, required, optional, error, helperText, iconLeading, iconTrailing.
<Radio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, disabled.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description, size.
<Switch> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<TableColumn> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: key, header, align, sortable, width, render.
<TableColumn> align must be one of 'left' | 'right'.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label, icon, badge, disabled.
<Tag> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: color, onRemove, children.
<Textarea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, error, helperText, maxLength.
<ToastOptions> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, title, message, duration.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, side, delay, className, children.
<Tooltip> side must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
